info.english_meaning: to collect to gather to treat equally to treat like family
info.hindI_arTa: baworanA apane ke samAna vartanA sajAtIyatA se rahanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: santAne ' ityeke santAno vijAtIyEravicCinnaH pravAhaH  saMstyAnam = saNGAtaH  banDuSabdena tadvyApAro vivAhAdiH lakzyate

upasargachandrika.example_text: aTa saNkulavilazwe parasparaparAhate (amaraH) yAvajjIvamahaM mOnI brahmacArI ca me pitetyAdi saNkulaM vacaH
